intro: The glossary is a collection of terms and definitions that your readers may encounter in the stories. Glossary terms can be linked from any text field using [[term_id]] syntax.
intro_instructions: Use the sidebar to browse and add terms. Click a term to edit its title and definition.
delete_term_confirm: Delete this term? Any [[term_id]] links in your content will become broken links.
empty_state: Define the terms in your stories
empty_state_description: Add terms your readers will encounter in the stories. Use [[term_id]] links in any text field to connect them.
rename_prompt_one: {{count}} link points to {{old}}. Update it to {{new}} too?
rename_prompt_other: {{count}} links point to {{old}}. Update them to {{new}} too?
empty_title: Define the terms in your stories
empty_body: Add terms your readers will encounter in the stories. Use <chip>[[term_id]]</chip> links in any text field to connect them.
